shortDescription: Modern 3-bedroom townhouse in Leaside with rooftop terrace and integrated garage.
fullDescription: Welcome to 44 Rumsey Road in the vibrant Leaside neighbourhood. This stylish multi-level townhouse provides the space of a house with the convenience of condo living. The main living area impresses with nine-foot ceilings, designer fixtures, and a seamless flow between rooms. The kitchen is a chef’s dream with quartz countertops, a large island, and high-end stainless-steel appliances. All 3 bedrooms are generously sized, and the primary offers a spa-inspired four-piece ensuite. Additional highlights include in-suite laundry, ample storage, and energy-efficient mechanicals. Transit, cycling infrastructure, and the best of Toronto’s cultural scene are right at your doorstep.
keyFeatures: Spacious kitchen with marble backsplash and gas range
Fenced yard ideal for children and pets
